page_content:
ECON200 Principles of Microeconomics (3 Credits)

Introduces economic models used to analyze economic behavior

by individuals and firms and consequent market outcomes. Applies conceptual analysis to several policy issues and surveys a variety of specific topics within the broad scope of microeconomics. Prerequisite: MATH107 or MATH110; or must have math eligibility of MATH113 or higher.

Additional Information: It is recommended that students complete ECON200 before taking ECON201.
